caption: A man wearing a grey wig, glasses, and headphones speaks into a microphone in a room decorated with framed photographs. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie and tan suspenders. To his right, a mannequin torso wears a black vest. A microphone is positioned in the foreground on the left, featuring a logo that reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". On the right side of the scene, another logo is visible that reads "BOSS TALK JOY". As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, speaking and shifting his facial expressions slightly, while his head moves minimally. The background remains static, showing a collection of framed images on the wall and clothing items, including a "LEE" branded garment, hanging behind him.
